card.name: CW01 Frost Enchanter
card.text: {W}, {T}: Tap target creature with a counter on it.

card.name: CW02 Dawnbringer Cleric
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • You gain 2 life. • Destroy target enchantment • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: CW04 Icebreaker Lynx
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked by a creature with a counter on it, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CW05 Blizzard Fox
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): CW05 Snowpelt Trickster

card.name: CW05 Snowpelt Trickster
card.text: Whenever this creature transforms into Snowpelt Trickster, put two frost counters on it and another target creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) --- (Front): CW05 Blizzard Fox

card.name: CW09 Inspiring Equine
card.text: Echo {1}{W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters, creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW10 Nova Recruiter
card.text: Echo {1}{W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: CW08 Priest of the Dawn
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, if you control a permanent with a counter on it, you draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: CW07 Flightless Fledgeling
card.text: This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you create a token, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): CW07 Watchful Dodo

card.name: CW07 Watchful Dodo
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature transforms into Watchful Dodo, you gain 4 life. --- (Front): CW07 Flightless Fledgeling

card.name: CW11 Oil Smiter
card.text: Flying {2}{W}: Put a frost counter on target creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CW03 Turinel's Enchanter
card.text: Echo {W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, put a frost counter on target creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CW06 Dead-Honor Griffin
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: ZZ CW12 Tundra Wanderer
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 2

card.name: CW13 Nova's Retribution
card.text: Choose one or both — • This spell deals 2 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. • Put a frost counter on target creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CW14 Meditative Journey
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. Triggered abilities of enchanted creature don't trigger.

card.name: ZZ CW15 Destroy Evil
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: CW16 Shimmering Veil
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, target creature gets +1/+1 and gains indestructible until end of turn. Then put four frost counters on Shimmering Veil. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your end step, put a frost counter on target creature.

card.name: ZZ CW17 Frozen Lance
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, put three frost counters on enchanted creature (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each counter on it and has "at the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice this creature."

card.name: CW18 Powdersnow Charge
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW19 Mistral Reckoning
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Return target creature you control to its owner's hand. Scry 1.

card.name: CU01 Deepwater Minnow
card.text: This card pays for {3} instead of {1} when exiled for delve costs. Sacrifice this creature: Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn.

card.name: CU03 Icebound Horror
card.text: This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may transform this creature --- (Back): CU03 Conqueror of Depths

card.name: CU03 Conqueror of Depths
card.text: Whenever this creature transforms into Conqueror of Depths, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. --- (Front): CU03 Icebound Horror

card.name: CU02 Remora
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CU04 Frostlens Geist
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, put a frost counter on target permanent. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CU05 Giant Strix
card.text: Flying Echo {1}{U} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature dies, put a stun counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CU07 Icebind Priestess
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put two stun counters on it.

card.name: CU06 Cuttlestunner
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) When this creature enters, mill 2 cards.

card.name: CU08 Snow Elemental
card.text: Flying Whenever you remove one or more counters from a permanent you control, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): CU08 Expanded Shimmer

card.name: CU08 Expanded Shimmer
card.text: Whenever you remove one or more counters from a permanent you control, you may transform this creature. --- (Front): CU08 Snow Elemental

card.name: CU09 Chilled Oilspouter
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) This creature enters with a stun counter on it.

card.name: CU10 Roving Iceblock
card.text: {3}{U}, {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Target player mills four cards.

card.name: CU11 Chill of the Nova
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, if you cast it, counter target spell, then put three frost counters on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1.

card.name: CU12 Fogbound Dismissal
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1} plus {1} for each card you own in exile.

card.name: CU13 Hypothermia
card.text: Echo {1}{U} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this enchantment enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

card.name: CU14 Read the Oil
card.text: Affinity for counters (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each counter on a permanent you control.) Draw 3 cards.

card.name: CU15 Twilight's Hoar
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Put two frost counters on target permanent. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Draw a card.

card.name: CU16 Chillbind
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Nonland permanents enter with a frost counter on them until the beginning of the next end step. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CU17 Branchstep
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, put a frost counter on enchanted creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card".

card.name: ZZ CU18 Hassle
card.text: Choose one — • Tap or untap target creature. • Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. • Exile a card from your graveyard.

card.name: ZZ CU19 Embrittle
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Put a frost counter on each nonland permanent. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CB01 Oil Collector
card.text: Echo {B} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, remove a counter from target permanent.

card.name: CB06 Echolocating Oildiver
card.text: Flying This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, mill a card.

card.name: CB02 Banisher of the Deep
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may exile up to one target card from a graveyard.

card.name: CB04 Cresting Eyefish
card.text: Echo {1}{B} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) Flash

card.name: CB05 Frostbitten Bones
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Lifelink When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: CB03 Heatdrinker Anaconda
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you lose 1 life. {B}: Put a frost counter on this creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: CB08 Autocratic Heatsucker
card.text: When this creature enters, create three 0/1 white Goat creature tokens. Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate this ability only once each turn.

card.name: CB07 Pelagic Swallower
card.text: When this creature enters, exile another target creature. When this creature leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: CB09 Carrion Whelp
card.text: This creature enters with one frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever a creature you control dies, transform this creature. --- (Back): CB09 Distended Mockery

card.name: CB09 Distended Mockery
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature you control dies, transform this creature. --- (Front): CB09 Carrion Whelp

card.name: CB10 Gurmag Angler
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: CB11 Wrap in Oil
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove a counter from a permanent you control or pay {2}. Destroy target creature.

card.name: CB12 Hate Siphon
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. Target creature you control gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: CB14 Drown in Oil
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: CB13 Isolation
card.text: Destroy target creature if its controller controls no other creatures.

card.name: CB15 Pooling Basin
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you draw a card and lose a life. Then put 2 frost counters on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you may transform this enchantment. --- (Back): CB15 Geoleum Phantasm

card.name: CB15 Geoleum Phantasm
card.text: Whenever this creature transforms into Geoleum Phantasm, you draw a card and lose a life. {5}{B}: Transform this creature. --- (Front): CB15 Pooling Basin

card.name: CB16 Corpse Trawling
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Return up to two target creatures from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CB17 Sight Unseen
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards it and another card from their hand.

card.name: CB18 Moon's Howling
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Target creature gets +3/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: CB19 Oilsea Dredging
card.text: When this enchantment enters, mill three cards and then put two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, return up to one target creature from your graveyard to your hand. Sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: CR01 Lantern Assistant
card.text: When this creature dies, remove up to two counters from target permanent. {1}{R}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw two cards.

card.name: CR03 Murkfire Heretic
card.text: This creature can't have counters placed on it. {2}{R}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: CR04 Mogg War Marshal
card.text: Echo {1}{R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.

card.name: CR02 Frosteater
card.text: This creature enters with three frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you remove a counter from a permanent you control, you may transform this creature. (This will trigger itself until it has no frost counters left.) --- (Back): CR02 Oilhungry Entity

card.name: CR02 Oilhungry Entity
card.text: Whenever you remove a counter from a permanent you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn. --- (Front): CR02 Frosteater

card.name: CR05 Blazing Oilmutt
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Haste Echo {2}{R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)

card.name: CR06 Bowlfire Keeper
card.text: {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Put a frost counter on this creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, discard a card at random, then draw a card if you discarded a card this way.

card.name: CR08 Terrifying Ogre
card.text: This creature enters with one frost counter. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Menace Whenever this creature attacks,you may transform it. --- (Back): CR08 Thundering Ogre

card.name: CR08 Thundering Ogre
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. --- (Front): CR08 Terrifying Ogre

card.name: CR07 Oillauncher Giant
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may put two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CR09 Geothermal Huddleworm
card.text: Whenever you remove a counter from a permanent you control, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CR10 Overgrown Tunneler
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, draw a card. Echo {2}{R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)

card.name: UR08 Murkfire Jet
card.text: Murkfire Jet deals 2 damage to any target. If a targeted permanent is a double-faced card, Murkfire Jet deals an additional 3 damage to that target.

card.name: CR12 Pyre Strike
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to target creature. If a creature dealt damage this way would be put into a graveyard this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: CR13 Geoleum Sickness
card.text: Gain control of target creature. Untap it. It gains haste and "At the beginning of your end step, return this to the control of its owner." for as long as you control it.

card.name: CR14 Tourna's Influence
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, attacking creatures get +2/+0 until end of turn. Then put four frost counters on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever a creature you control attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CR15 Frazzled Insight
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a card from your hand. Draw two cards.

card.name: CR16 Hyperthermia
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, menace, and must attack each combat if able.

card.name: CR17 Entombed's Rage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a card from your graveyard. Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CR18 Oil Slick
card.text: Up to two target creatures can't block this turn. Deal 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CR19 Blazing Club
card.text: Echo {R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When Blazing Club enters, equip it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and gains menace. Equip {4}

card.name: CG01 Frost Sloth
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): CG01 Moonlit Sloth

card.name: CG10 Majestic Caribou
card.text: Echo {2}{G} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, you gain 3 life.

card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile three cards from your graveyard. If you do, return up to one target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: ZZ CG11 Snowflats Dreadbeast

card.name: CG12 Tundral Showdown
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: CG13 Lunar Might
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. If it is a double-faced card, it gets an additional +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: CG14 Frozen Venom
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, target creature gets deathtouch until end of turn. Then put a frost counter on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn. Sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: CG15 Natural Will
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. Put any double-faced cards revealed this way into your hand. Exile the rest.

card.name: CG16 Frostbreaker's Shovel
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2. If equipped creature has one or more counters on it, it gets an additional +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: CG17 Snow Out
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Transform target double-faced nonland permanent.

card.name: CG18 Broken Rime
card.text: Enchant Land When this enchantment enters, put a stun counter on enchanted permanent. Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any color.

card.name: CG19 Return to Nature
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: CA02 Skittering Surveyor
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CA03 Meltfrost Basin
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control transforms, surveil 2, then put a frost counter on this artifact. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it).

card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put an equinox counter on this permanent. Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Transform this artifact. --- (Back): UZ06 Rimefeast Demon

card.text: Menace This creature has power and toughness equal to the number of equinox counters on it. {3}{W}{B}: Put an equinox counter on this creature. --- (Front): UZ06 Altar to the Nova

card.name: UZ01 Coldlight Refractor
card.text: When this creature enters, put a frost counter on up to two target creatures you opponents control. Whenever a creature an opponent controls with a frost counter would untap, instead remove a frost counter from it.

card.name: UW03 Ethereal Judge
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Exile this creature: Exile another target creature until end of turn.

card.name: RW02 Greenhouse Enthusiast
RW08 Watcher for the Frost
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you place one or more frost counters on a permanent an opponent controls, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): RW08 Coldsnap Breaker

card.name: RW08 Coldsnap Breaker
card.text: When this creature transforms into Coldsnap Breaker, choose 2 — • Put a frost counter on target permanent • Exile target creature if it has a counter on it. • Transform this creature and put two frost counters on it. --- (Front): RW08 Watcher for the Frost

card.name: UW06 Karmic Guide
card.text: Flying, Protection from Black Echo {3}{W}{W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters, return target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: ZZ UW07 Cold Sun Acolyte
card.text: Whenever you put a frost counter on a permanent for the first time each turn, draw a card. {5}{W}: Put a frost counter on target permanent.

card.name: UW08 Wizened Trent
card.text: When this creature enters, put a frost counter on target permanent and this creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever an opponent removes a counter from a permanent they control, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UW08 Mooncrazed Tnert

card.name: UW08 Mooncrazed Tnert
card.text: Vigilance This creature gets +1/+1 for each counter on a permanent your opponent controls. {3}{W}: Put a frost counter on target permanent. --- (Front): UW08 Wizened Trent

card.name: UW09 Shatter Across Time
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent if it has a counter on it.

card.name: UW10 Icebox Rations
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) When this enchantment enters, create a food token, a clue token, and a tapped treasure token. At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control no artifact tokens, you may exile this enchantment and scry 2.

card.name: RZ07 Tangible Virtue
card.text: Creatures you control with counters on them get +1/+1. Creatures your opponents control with counters on them get -1/-1.

card.name: UU01 Spinners of Myth
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may mill a card. When you do, exile target card from your graveyard.

card.name: UU02 Frozen Bleb
card.text: Whenever you put one or more counters on a permanent you don't control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: UU03 Frazzled Librarian
card.text: Echo {U}{U} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters, return up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UU04 Fleet Devourer
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you exile one or more cards from your graveyard, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UU04 Beached Atrocity

card.name: UU04 Beached Atrocity
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Beached Atrocity, put five +1/+1 counters on it. {2}{U}, Remove a counter from this enchantment: Draw a card. Whenever you draw your third card each turn, you may transform this enchantment. --- (Front): UU04 Fleet Devourer

card.name: UU05 Ice Dragon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card. Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a frost counter on target permanent.

card.name: UU06 Rift-Tearer
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Sacrifice this creature: Counter target spell if it was cast from exile.

card.name: UU07 Delver's Bane
card.text: Delve When you cast this spell, add {U} for each card with permafrost exiled with it. Whenever you exile a card with permafrost from your graveyard, add {U}.

card.name: UU08 Search the Depths
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Surveil 2, then draw 2 cards.

card.name: UU09 Benthic Mandate
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Counter target spell.

card.name: UU10 Brumation
card.text: Tap target creature. Put X stun counters on it, where X is its power.

card.name: UU11 Turn of the Tides
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may collect evidence 4 and/or 8. (To collect evidence 4, exile cards with total mana value 4 or greater from your graveyard.) Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Untap a land you control if you collected evidence 4. Draw a card if you collected evidence 8.

card.name: UB01 Oilsplasher Viper
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, remove up to five counters from target permanent and mill a card for each counter removed this way.

card.name: UB02 Caller of the Deep
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. {T}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: Create a 0/1 white Goat creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UB03 Vigil Holder
card.text: Whenever a card is put into exile from your graveyard, draw a card. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: UB04 Frostbiter Opportunist
card.text: This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UB04 Heatbound Vampire

card.name: UB04 Heatbound Vampire
card.text: When this creature transforms into Heatbound Vampire, return target creature with lesser power from your graveyard to the battlefield. --- (Front): UB04 Frostbiter Opportunist

card.name: UB05 Oil Dragon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Whenever this creature attacks, you may remove a counter from up to one target permanent.

card.name: UB07 Geoleum Rager
card.text: Menace Echo {0} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature's echo cost is paid, discard two cards.

card.name: RB01 Hateful Deepspawn
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Whenever you exile a card from your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: UB08 Suspended Cryorot
card.text: When this enchantment enters, destroy target creature and put four frost counters on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever a creature dies, exile this enchantment and return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: UB09 Leviathan's Resurface
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: UB10 Trudge through Muck
card.text: Echo {5}{B}{B} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) Creatures get -2/-1.

card.name: UB12 Infested Cheese
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: UR01 Goblin Conflagrator
card.text: Haste Echo— Pay 5 life (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)

card.name: UR02 Thick-Skinned Goblin
card.text: You may pay {0} rather than pay the echo costs for permanents you control. {R}: This creature gains protection from red until end of turn. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything red until end of turn..)

card.name: UR03 Snow Devil
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever an opponent loses life, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UR03 Hateful Oilbringer

card.name: UR03 Hateful Oilbringer
card.text: Trample When this creature transforms into Hateful Oilbringer, you may pay up to 4 life. Put that many oil counters on this creature. This creature gets +1/+0 for each counter on it. When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield. --- (Front): UR03 Snow Devil

card.name: UR04 Ice Recycler
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) When this card is put into exile, return target instant or sorcery card with permafrost in your exile to your hand.

card.name: UR05 Earthshoveler
card.text: When this creature enters, discard a card and draw a card. {1}{R}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: UR06 Oilsick Huddlewurm
card.text: Trample Echo {2}{R}{R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: UR07 Mountaintop Watcher
card.text: Whenever an ability you control triggers, each opponent loses 1 life. This ability only triggers once each turn. Whenever an ability an opponent controls triggers, each opponent loses 1 life. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: CR11 Live Coals
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) This spell deals 2 damage to target creature.

card.name: UR09 Flame Bullets
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove up to five counters from among permanents you control. This spell deals damage divided among any number of targets equal to the number of counters removed to cast this spell.

card.name: ZZ UR10 Trigger Happy
card.text: Choose a triggered ability of target permanent. It triggers. You control that ability. (Any frost counters that would prevent it from triggering do so.)

card.name: UR13 Pyre Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Exile target card from a graveyard. • Remove a counter from target permanent.

card.name: UG01 Icewing Crane
card.text: Flying {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell or activate the ability of a creature.

card.name: UG02 Frostmelt Rider
card.text: This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever another permanent you control transforms, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UG02 Trumpeting Frostbreaker

card.name: UG02 Trumpeting Frostbreaker
card.text: When this creature transforms into Trumpeting Frostbreaker, you may transform another target double-faced permanent you control. {2}{G}{G}: Transform this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): UG02 Frostmelt Rider

card.name: UG03 Boroughgoyf
card.text: This creature's power is equal to the number of counters on permanents you control and its toughness is equal to that number plus 1.

card.name: UG04 Watcher Spider
card.text: Reach This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever this creature blocks, you may transform it. --- (Back): UG04 Silkthread Spider

card.name: UG04 Silkthread Spider
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. --- (Front): UG04 Watcher Spider

card.name: UG05 Simian Soul Mentor
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control. Remove a counter from a permanent you control, Exile this card from your graveyard: Add {G}.

card.name: UG06 Echoing Dreadmaw
card.text: Trample Echo {3}{G} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters, draw a card for each card with echo in your graveyard.

card.name: UG07 Ouphe Prismite
card.text: Ward {G} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {G}.) Lands have "{1},{T}: Add one mana of any color." {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: UG08 Bounding Chanter
card.text: Echo {G} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters and when its echo cost is paid, add {G}{G}.

card.name: UG09 Frost Flowers
card.text: Whenever a player removes a frost counter or stun counter from a permanent, create a tapped treasure token. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: UG10 Snowsearching
card.text: When this enchantment enters, mill three cards. You may put a permanent from among the cards milled this way into your hand. If you do, put three frost counters on this enchantment. At the beginning of your upkeep, mill three cards. You may put a permanent from among the cards milled this way into your hand. Sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: UG12 Blossoming Blast
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to another target creature. If excess damage is dealt this way, you gain that much life.

card.name: UW11 Scatter to the Wind
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this aura enters, put a frost counter and a +1/+1 counter on the enchanted creature. When enchanted creature leaves the battlefield, distribute its counters among any number of target permanents.

card.name: UW12 Squadron's Screech
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying. Flashback—Tap two untapped white creatures you control. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: UU12 Snow Front
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card, then put a frost counter on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you transform another permanent, you may transform this permanent. --- (Back): UU12 Swelling Storm

card.name: UU12 Swelling Storm
card.text: When this enchantment transforms into Swelling Storm, draw a card. Creatures your opponents control get -1/-0. --- (Front): UU12 Snow Front

card.name: UU13 Fathomless Deep
card.text: Whenever you exile one or more cards from your graveyard, target opponent mills cards equal to the number of cards exiled this way.

card.name: UB13 Heartless Act
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with no counters on it. • Remove up to three counters from target creature

card.name: UB11 Bore Thoughts
card.text: Search target player's library and graveyard for up to two cards and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

card.name: UR11 Pull of the Iconoclast
card.text: Up to two target instant or sorcery spells in your graveyard gain permafrost until end of turn. (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.)

card.name: UR12 Burning-Oil Fists
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, remove up to that many counters from target permanent.

card.name: UG13 Infinite Potential
card.text: Put a number of +1/+1 counter on each creature you control equal to the number of counters on them.

card.name: UG11 Regrow the Menagerie
card.text: Return up to one target double-faced card and up to one permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UB06 Scavenging Leeches
card.text: This creature enters with three frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you lose life, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): UB06 Leech Wurm

card.name: UB06 Leech Wurm
card.text: This creature has power and toughness each equal to half your life total, rounded up. --- (Front): UB06 Scavenging Leeches

card.name: RW01 Nova Arbiter
card.text: Triggered abilities don't trigger.

card.name: MW01 Sun Dog
card.text: Flying When you cast this spell, create a copy of it. Non-Spirit creatures enter with an additional frost counter. Whenever one or more counters are removed from a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: RW03 Turinel, Nova's Chosen
card.text: Permanents your opponents control with frost counters on them lose all abilities except mana abilities. {4}{W}: Put a frost counter on target permanent.

card.name: RW04 Impermafrost
card.text: Target nonland permanent gains permafrost. Exile it. (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.)

card.name: RW05 Bulwark of the Apocalypse
card.text: Lifelink Echo {1}{W}{W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature dies, destroy all other creatures.

card.name: RZ02 Frost Sculptor
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Creatures tokens you control get +X/+X, where X is their mana value.

card.name: RW07 Brightfrost Blade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter and a frost counter on it." Equip {1}

card.name: RU01 Deepfrost Caller
card.text: Sea Monster spells you cast have affinity for counters. (They cost {1} less for each counter on a permanent you control.) (Leviathans, Krakens, Serpents, and Octopuses are Sea Monsters.)

card.name: RU02 Benthic Dreadnought
card.text: Echo {3}{U}{U} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) Whenever this creature attacks, draw a card, then put two frost counters on this creature.

card.name: ZZ RU03 Dredge Through Space
card.text: Delve Permafrost Look at the top six or bottom four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Flashback {5}{U}{U}

card.name: RU04 Ominous Iceberg
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a noncreature card from among them and put it into your hand. If you do, put two frost counters on this creature. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): RU04 Iceskipper

card.name: RU04 Iceskipper
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may have it gain flying until end of turn. If you do, put a frost counter on it. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. --- (Front): RU04 Ominous Iceberg

card.name: ZZ RU05 Stungazer Leviathan
card.text: Nonland permanents with counters on them don't untap during their controller's untap step. {3}{U}: Tap target nonland permanent.

card.name: RU06 Muffle
card.text: Counter target triggered ability. Draw a card.

card.name: RU07 Krakilakin, the Scouter
card.text: Sea Monster spells you control have Delve. (Leviathans, Krakens, Serpents, and Octopuses are Sea Monsters.) Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting a spell with delve pays for {2} instead of {1}. {T}: Surveil 1.

card.name: ZZ RB02 The Estranged Tiram Egal
card.text: This creature enters with nineteen -1/-1 counters on it. As long as Tiram Egal's power is greater than 5, it has flying. As long as Tiram Egal's power is greater than 10, it has indestructible. {2}: Remove a counter from a permanent you control.

card.name: RB03 Ritual of the Deep
card.text: The next spell you cast this turn has delve. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: RB04 Bloodsucking Gnats
card.text: Flying, Lifelink This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever you gain life, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): RB04 Bogswarm

card.name: RB04 Bogswarm
card.text: Lifelink When this creature transforms into Bogswarm, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it deals damage equal to its power to any target. {3}{B}, Put a frost counter on this creature: Transform this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): RB04 Bloodsucking Gnats

card.name: ZZ RB05 Wave of Oil
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Target player mills cards equal to the number of counters on creatures destroyed this way.

card.name: RB06 Heatbringer Cultist
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Remove a counter from target permanent. Whenever you remove one or more counters from a permanent you control, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: RB07 Banishment of Hope
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Exile target card from a graveyard. Each opponent exiles a card from their hand.

card.name: RR01 Frenzy Blaster
card.text: Whenever you remove one or more counters from a permanent you control, this creature deals damage equal to the number of counters removed to any target.

card.name: RR02 Tourna, Burning Heretic

card.name: RG03 Earthshaker Bigfoot
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature becomes blocked, draw a card. {1}{G}: Target creature blocks this creature this turn if able. --- (Front): RG03 Snowshaker Yeti

card.name: RG04 Vorga of the Crossroads
RG05 Leviathan Investigation
card.text: Create a number of Clue tokens equal to the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: RG06 Blooming of the Night
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card for each double-faced nonland permanent you control and put them onto the battlefield tapped. Then, for each double-faced nonland permanent you control, you may transform that permanent.

card.name: RG07 Frost Shivs
card.text: This enchantment enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Treat all counters on permanents you control as all types of counters on this enchantment in addition to their other types.

card.name: RL01 Moonlight Underbrush
card.text: This land enters tapped with four frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) {T}: Add {G} Whenever this land becomes tapped, transform it. --- (Back): RL01 Barren Snowpack

card.name: RL01 Barren Snowpack
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. Transform this land. --- (Front): RL01 Moonlight Underbrush

card.name: MB01 Murkdeep Excavator
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) You may cast spells exiled with this creature. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, you lose 3 life.

card.name: MZ01 Kiora, Consumed by Depths
card.text: Sea Monster spells you control can't be countered. (Leviathans, Krakens, Serpents, and Octopuses are Sea Monsters) Whenever you cast a Sea Monster spell, you may mill X cards, where X is that spell's mana value. If you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: MB02 Welden, Deep Warden
card.text: When this planeswalker dies, you draw two cards and lose 2 life. [+1]: Surveil 1. [-2]: Exile up to one card from your graveyard. Add {B}. [-6]: Destroy target creature.

card.name: UA01 Frozen Construct
card.text: This creature enters with three frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) When this creature dies, draw two cards.

card.name: UA04 Avalanche Boulder
card.text: This artifact enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice this artifact. If you do, destroy target creature.

card.name: UA03 False Leviathan
card.text: Flying Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: UA05 Tome of Decay
card.text: {2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card unless you remove a counter from a permanent you control.

card.name: UA02 Trapmaw
card.text: Flash Echo {2} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.) When this creature enters or dies, scry 1.

card.name: UA06 Soul Basket
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Scry X, where X is the number of cards exiled with this artifact.

card.name: RZ01 Rime of the Ancient Mariner
card.text: I — Destroy target creature. Create Mariner's Curse, an Enchantment with "At the beginning of your upkeep, lose 1 life." II — Create a 3/1 black Skeleton creature token. III — Discard a card.

card.name: RW06 Nova's Disdain
card.text: Whenever a frost counter or a stun counter is removed from a permanent, draw a card. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: ZZ RA02 The Equinox Engine
card.text: When the Equinox Engine enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, transform all double-faced nonland permanents. Transformed creatures get +2/+2.

card.name: RA03 Miracle Fertilzer
card.text: {4}, {T}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. {T}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Draw a card.

card.name: RL02 Frozen Steppe
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Put a frost counter on this land if it has no counters on it. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. Activate this ability only if this land has a counter on it.

card.name: RL03 Deep Oilbed
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Put a frost counter on this land if it has no counters on it. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Activate this ability only if this land has a counter on it.

card.name: RL04 Barren Crag
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Put a frost counter on this land if it has no counters on it. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Activate this ability only if this land has a counter on it.

card.name: RL05 Flowering Mount
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Put a frost counter on this land if it has no counters on it. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Activate this ability only if this land has a counter on it.

card.name: RL06 Tundric Forest
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Put a frost counter on this land if it has no counters on it. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Activate this ability only if this land has a counter on it.

card.name: MR01 Tarball
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove X counters from among permanents you control. This spell deals twice X damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.

card.name: RZ03 Rimebind
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, return the exiled permanent to the battlefield. {3}{W}{U}: Put a frost counter on this enchantment. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.)

card.name: RZ04 Burning at Both Ends
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from outside your hand, you may remove a counter from a permanent you control. This ability only triggers once each turn. Whenever you remove a counter from a permanent you control, you may exile target card from a graveyard. This ability only triggers once each turn. Whenever a card is exiled from your graveyard, add {B}{R}. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: RZ05 Enraged Magmaderm
card.text: Vanishing 3 (This creature enters with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) Whenever you remove a counter from this creature, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: RZ06 Snowdrift Winder
card.text: Whenever another creature you control deals combat damage to a player, put a frost counter on it. Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it attacks, double the number of each kind of counter on it. {1}{G}{W}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on that permanent.

card.name: MZ02 Tel, Baron of the Icevein
card.text: Flying Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Sacrifice another token: Scry 1, then draw cards equal to the token's mana value.

card.name: RZ08 Frostviper of Ier
card.text: Deathtouch This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Whenever another creature leaves the battlefield, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): RZ08 Venomous Preacher

card.name: RZ08 Venomous Preacher
card.text: Transformed creatures you control have deathtouch. Whenever a transformed creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose a life. --- (Front): RZ08 Frostviper of Ier

card.name: RZ09 Hibernating Mudshell
card.text: This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you may transform this creature. {2}{G}{U}: Transform this creature. --- (Back): RZ09 Earlymelt Hexshell

card.name: RZ09 Earlymelt Hexshell
card.text: {4}{GU}: Transform target permanent you control. Transformed creatures you control with counters on them get +1/+1 and have hexproof. --- (Front): RZ09 Hibernating Mudshell

card.name: RZ10 Burning Sun Heretics
card.text: Haste, Lifelink Echo {R}{W} When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target. At the beginning of your end step, exile this creature. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: ZZ RZ07 Lord of Tens
card.text: ZZ RZ07 Lord of Tens enters with 10 tail counters on it. Whenever you remove a counter from ZZ RZ07 Lord of Tens, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token. Whenever ZZ RZ07 Lord of Tens is dealt damage, remove that many tail counters from it.

card.name: RL07 Glade of Forgetting
card.text: When this land enters from exile, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {C}. Exile this land until the beginning of your next end step.

card.name: ZZ MA01 Eternities Walker
card.text: Annihilator 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices two permanents.) When this card leaves exile and it wasn't cast, exile target nonland permanent. {0}: Return this creature from exile to its owner's hand. Only your opponents may activate this ability. Suspend 3—{4}

card.name: RU08 Thought Spiral
card.text: Players may cast instant and sorcery cards from their graveyards. If a spell cast this way would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: RA01 Chilly Clasp
card.text: This artifact enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) {T}, Remove a frost counter from this artifact: Put a frost counter on target permanent. {4}, {T}: Proliferate.

card.name: UW05 Angel of Turinel
card.text: Flying, Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, you may tap it. If you do, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: RB08 Grumsaw's Depths
card.text: You can't gain life. Whenever one or more cards are exiled from your graveyard, put an oil counter on this enchantment. As long as this enchantment has five or more oil counters on it, rather than pay the mana cost of spells you control you may pay life equal to the converted mana cost of the spell.

card.name: MR08 Tourna's Fury
card.text: This spell deals damage equal to the number of cards you own in exile to any target.

card.name: RG08 Nomad of Ier
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a quest counter on it. Remove a quest counter from this creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn and gains trample. Remove a quest counter from this creature: This creature gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: ZZ MZ03 Hell on Earth
card.text: Creatures have haste. When this enchantment enters, each player returns all creatures from their graveyard to the battlefield. If a creature would be put into a graveyard from anywhere and it isn't the cleanup phase, instead return it to its owner's hand. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, exile all creatures.

card.name: ML01 Grumsaw, the Oilsea
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {2}, {T}: Target player mills cards equal to the number of Islands you control.

card.name: RR08 Tomb Conflagration
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) This spell deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: UW07 Frozen Snowballer
card.text: Vigilance This creature enters with two frost counters on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) {T}, Remove a counter from this creature: Put a frost counter on target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: CU19 Spinning Frost
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Mill three cards. You may put a noncreature, nonland card from among them into your hand. If you don't, draw a card.

card.name: RB02 Egal Tiram, Primordial
card.text: Whenever you remove one or more counters from another permanent you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. As long as Egal's power is greater than 5, it has flying. As long as Egal's power is greater than 10, it has indestructible.

card.name: MU01 Brumal the Ethereal
card.text: This creature enters as a copy of a creature, except it's legendary, its name is Brumal the Ethereal and it has Vanishing 3. (This creature enters with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.)

card.name: CW12 Frostgoat Shepherd
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, create a 0/1 white Goat creature token.

card.name: CW15 Crystalline Ire
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature. Exile target creature. You gain 2 life.

card.name: CU18 Thoughtbind
card.text: Up to one target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn. Target player mills three cards.

card.name: RU03 Parallax Ice
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) Copy target spell if it's a copy.

card.name: RU05 Dredged Monolith
card.text: If a player would mill one or more cards, they instead look at the top three cards of their library, put one into their hand and the rest into their graveyard. {2}, {T}: Mill a card.

card.name: CG11 Rooting Vorrac
card.text: When this creature enters, reveal the top four cards of your library. Put up to one double-faced card from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: MZ03 Scepter of Undeath
card.text: Whenever a token enters under your control, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: The next time a token you control would leave the battlefield, create a copy of that token.

card.name: RA02 Greasewheel Machinist
card.text: Permafrost (When a card with permafrost is put into exile, you may copy it. If you do, you may cast that copy.) {1}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Choose 1 — • Add one mana of any color. • Exile target card from a graveyard. • Mill two cards.

card.name: ZZ UW13 Overbearing
card.text: Creatures you control enter with two +1/+1 counters and have echo {W}. (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)

card.name: UW13 Overcoat
card.text: Creatures you control with counters on them get +1/+1.

card.name: CW17 Frozen Pike
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, put two frost counters on enchanted creature. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: UW04 Hulking Mastiff
card.text: This creature enters with a frost counter on it. (Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent with a frost counter on it would trigger, instead remove a frost counter from it.) At the beginning of your upkeep, transform this creature. --- (Back): UW04 Sedate Puppy

card.name: UW04 Sedate Puppy
card.text: When this creature transforms into Sedate Puppy, scry 1 and draw a card. --- (Front): UW04 Hulking Mastiff
